## Content checklist

- [ ] Frontmatter is valid
- [ ] `status` is correct (`draft/review/approved/published`)
- [ ] `translation_key` is set when bilingual pairing is needed
- [ ] Links and references were checked

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Publish intent

- [ ] Ready to merge to `main` and publish
- [ ] Keep as draft/review branch
